vata.indicators: Elevated breathing rates (>18 RPM), high HRV amplitude fluctuations under resting conditions, light/interrupted sleep architecture.
vata.recommending_therapies: Warm Dinacharya fluids, slow pranayama (Nadi Shodhana), calming meditation.

pitta.indicators: Elevated metabolic indices (avg skin temp >36.9 C), elevated average sleeping resting heart rate (>75 BPM), deep but intense sleep patterns.
pitta.recommending_therapies: Cooling teas, sheetali pranayama, cooling oil massages.

kapha.indicators: Slow baseline heart rate (<55 BPM), slow deep respiration (<10 RPM), prolonged heavy sleeping stages with high immobility factors.
kapha.recommending_therapies: Invigorating yoga, stimulating pranayama (Kapalabhati), light warm diets.
